name: techathon2026-alt-f4
description: PowerDown - a real-time office energy digital twin by Team ALT+F4

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web,bot -c cyan,green,magenta "pnpm --filter @altf4/server dev" "pnpm --filter @altf4/web dev" "pnpm --filter @altf4/bot dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @altf4/shared typecheck && pnpm --filter @altf4/server build && pnpm --filter @altf4/web build && pnpm --filter @altf4/bot build
